title: Impressively Optimized.
description: [26.1.2–1.21.6] Impressively Optimized is a fast, OptiFine-like Fabric pack with good FPS, smooth play, and open-source freedom...
body:
# 🎮 Enjoy and Support the Modpack!

## 🚀 Impressively Optimized
![The logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2c2f227604ea539e9a6c8b995074f6d9dc7fd0a5_0.webp)

**Impressively Optimized** is a carefully curated Vanilla+ modpack focused on delivering *smooth performance*, *useful quality-of-life features*, and *enhanced visuals* — all while preserving Minecraft’s original style and gameplay logic.

## 🔧 Key Features:

### ⚡ **Smooth and Optimized Gameplay**
Built around **Sodium** and other carefully selected optimization mods, this modpack is designed to provide high FPS, reduced lag, faster loading times, and an overall smoother Minecraft experience on both low-end and mid-range PCs.

### 🪞 **Vanilla-Friendly Visual Enhancements**
Enjoy support for lightweight shaderpacks, improved animations, and carefully chosen resource packs that enhance Minecraft’s atmosphere without changing its iconic vanilla look and feel.

### 🧰 **Useful Quality-of-Life Features**
Includes practical and non-intrusive utilities such as recipe viewing, brightness improvements, visual tweaks, and other small enhancements that make gameplay more comfortable while still feeling completely vanilla-friendly.

### 🌍 **Designed for Every Playstyle**
Whether you're building, exploring, surviving, playing multiplayer, or simply enjoying a relaxed world, the modpack is tuned to remain stable, responsive, and immersive in every environment.

### 🧵 **Fabric-Based**
Built on the **Fabric mod loader**, known for speed, lightweight design, and rapid updates. This allows excellent compatibility, quick startup times, and a modern Minecraft experience.

### 👐 **Open-Source**
Released under the **MIT License**, this modpack is free to use, modify, and share. Perfect for players, creators, and developers who value openness and flexibility *(though proper permissions may still be required when redistributing modpack).*  

### 🎨 **Extended Resourcepack and Shaderpack Support**
Carefully configured to provide broader compatibility with modern resource packs and shaderpacks while maintaining smooth performance and the vanilla Minecraft atmosphere.

## ✅ Why Choose This Modpack?

If you’re looking for:
- Smooth performance without losing the vanilla feel  
- Vanilla+ visual improvements and animations  
- Useful quality-of-life features without gameplay overhaul  
- Lightweight shader and resource pack support  
- A clean and reliable Fabric experience  
- Open-source freedom  

Then **Impressively Optimized** is the modpack for you.~~~~
